headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest Las Vegas Raiders updates, intel, buzz
description: The Raiders are set to pick No. 1 and have 10 total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on Las Vegas.

headline: Raiders' Spytek says teams have inquired about No. 1 draft pick
description: Raiders GM John Spytek said teams have called to inquire about the possibility of trading for the No. 1 pick but added, "Those teams know where they stand."

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest New England Patriots updates, intel, buzz
description: The Patriots pick late in Round 1 and have 11 total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what New England might do.

headline: Remembering Dave McGinnis, longtime NFL coach, commentator
description: Legwold and the late McGinnis formed a bond over combine breakfasts, large trucks, makeshift wallets and bobbleheads.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Denver Broncos updates, intel, buzz
description: The Broncos are set to pick No. 62 and have seven total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what Denver might do.

headline: Why Schrager feels Jets are targeting David Bailey at No. 2
description: Peter Schrager tells Pat McAfee that he expects the Jets to select David Bailey with the second pick in the 2026 NFL draft.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest Tennessee Titans updates, intel, buzz

headline: Why Tannenbaum says Steelers should draft Ty Simpson
description: Mike Tannenbaum and Jason McCourty discuss why the Steelers should consider drafting Alabama quarterback Ty Simpson even if Aaron Rodgers returns.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest Dallas Cowboys updates, intel, buzz
description: The Cowboys have eight picks, two in Round 1. Here's the latest on what Dallas might do in the 2026 NFL draft.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Which teams should trade up, down in Round 1?
description: Would it make sense for the Eagles, Bears and Chiefs to trade up in Round 1? Should the Cowboys and Lions try to move down the board? Here's our advice for 10 teams.

headline: Meet Iowa's Gennings Dunker, the NFL draft's viral star
description: He was "one of five" on Iowa's offensive line. That was before the mullet and personality took over the NFL combine.

headline: 2026 NFL draft rankings: Jordan Reid's top 500 prospects
description: Jordan Reid ranked every draftable player in the 2026 class and graded them by round. Here's his final list, plus scouting reports on the top names.

headline: Lions open to trading up in first round for the right guy
description: Holmes has shown a willingness to make bold moves during the draft, and they have often paid off.

headline: 49ers well positioned to add a receiver in the NFL draft
description: San Francisco added two veteran receivers in free agency and now want to add youth at the NFL draft.
